rows.label: tlk4550019103_msg0001
rows.name:
All I used to think about
was curing patients.

rows.label: tlk4550019103_msg0002
rows.name:
Now I have other priorities.
Passing on my knowledge to
kids. It's not bad, actually.

rows.label: tlk4550019103_msg0003
rows.name:
I want this school in Iyasaki
to be so good that Acedia's
seminary can't compare.
